title: Furnace Punching
description: Allows you to quickly extract items from furnaces by punching the front.
body:
### Furnace Punching?

This mod allows you to quickly extract smelted items from a furnace; simply left-click (punch) the front face of the furnace and the items will pop out.

### Features:
- Furnace punching,
- Config options - toggle punching for vanilla or modded furnaces,
- Custom sound effect (can be disabled or changed in the config)

### Notes:
- Furnace Punching will probably work in multiplayer, but is untested.
- This mod is designed to work on server-and-client side, meaning that clients do not *need* to have it installed.
